examples: The earlier verdict was overturned on a legal technicality.
The appeal Court rejected the appeal on a technicality.
“The T. rex probably couldn’t have done the arm-wrestling move,” Conrad says. “So maybe you could get him on a technicality。”
Rangers Football Club may not be in administration because of a legal technicality, it has emerged.
On its own, the technicality, first reported by ESPN, is an extremely minor issue.
